html:
Research notes need evidence and memory

Research writing is a different stress test from agenda writing. It uses links, citations-like references, quoted excerpts, tables, and memory records.

The frontend should help a reader move from source evidence to a next action without pretending the evidence is just another task card.

Evidence matrix

SignalOrg expressionUI expectation
External sourceOrg manuallabeled outbound link
Internal linkreading queuestable cross-record target
Attachmentpaper notesevidence, not broken text
Date[2026-05-13 Wed]readable historical marker

Notes

  • ZK style content is not only backlink graphs.

  • A research article may contain unfinished tasks, but it should still read as an article first.

  • Memory-worthy snippets should become records with stable IDs.

AI-assisted agenda handoff

An AI agenda workflow needs explainable context:

  1. What source created this card?

  2. Which parser facts were used?

  3. Which human decision remains?

Export blocks should not break the article surface.

Records

Research reading queue

Track sources that need review before they become public notes.

Archive raw highlights

Raw highlights belong in source material, while synthesis belongs in the Blog article.

Agenda

Render research evidence links

The notes view should show links and properties clearly enough for follow-up.

TODO [#B] Promote stable IDs into source cards

Eventually source blocks can display parsed title, tags, and record counts.
